html:
Exclusive to:  
Only during the Event: Lunar New Year Events

Firecrackers are Items exclusive to Lunar New Year Events in Don't Starve Together. Three Firecrackers can be acquired in exchange for 1 Lucky Gold Nugget at a Shrine.

They can be set on fire with a Torch or Lighter to produce sparkles, and will be destroyed in the process. When set off, nearby Mobs such as Hounds will be startled and cower in fear, giving the Firecrackers a use apart from the festivities.

Trivia

  • Red Firecrackers were introduced during the Year of the Gobbler event in 2017.

'''Firecrackers''' are [[Items]] exclusive to Lunar New Year [[Events]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''.
Three Firecrackers can be acquired in exchange for 1 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]] at a Shrine. 

They can be set on fire with a [[Torch]] or [[Willow's Lighter|Lighter]] to produce sparkles, and will be destroyed in the process. When set off, nearby [[Mobs]] such as [[Hound]]s will be startled and cower in fear, giving the Firecrackers a use apart from the festivities.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Red Firecrackers were introduced during the [[Year of the Gobbler]] event in 2017.
